text.title: Solo Context Switch Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals from daily block log to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for solo-context-switch-protocol.

decision-tree.root-question: Did the day follow Builder→Operator→Inbox order with silenced notifications + handoff notes?

conclusion.verdict: BLOCK — rerun day plan; Builder always first
BLOCK — silence notifications for next Builder block
ACT — review override list; most items belong in next Operator inbox
ACT — structural fix (lengthen Operator block / hire / cut scope)
skip — preconditions in Applies-If not met

text.example: Day 2026-05-20: Builder 09-12 silenced + handoff; Operator 13-15 + handoff; Inbox 15-16 + handoff; 0 violations, 0 overrides → APPROVE.
